zh.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy於1045年12月6日出生在法國皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪。她和Hugh de Clermont至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於大約1110年在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年66歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪可勒爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy于1045年12月6日出生在法国皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪。她和Hugh de Clermont至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于大约1110年在法国皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年66岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪可勒爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Roucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy was born on 6 December 1045, in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France. She had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Hugh de Clermont. She died about 1110, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in Clermont, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy est née le 6 décembre 1045, à Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Hugh de Clermont. Elle est décédée environ 1110, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Clermont, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy wurde am 6. Dezember 1045 in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Hugh de Clermont mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1110 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Clermont, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy è nata il il 6 dicembre 1045 nel Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Hugh de Clermont. Morì circa 1110, nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Clermont, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucyは1045年12月6日にフランスピカーディソンメモントディディエルで生まれた。彼女はHugh de Clermontとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1110年にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスで66歳で死去し，フランスピカーディクラーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy(은)는 1045년 12월 6일 프랑스 피카디 솜 몽디디어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugh de Clermont(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1110년 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 클레몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy nasceu em 6 de dezembro de 1045, em Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Hugh de Clermont. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1110, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Clermont, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy родилась 6 декабря 1045 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Hugh de Clermont. Она умерла около 1110 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности клирмонт, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Marguerite Roucy nació el 6 de diciembre de 1045, en Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Hugh de Clermont. Murió aproximadamente 1110, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Clermont, Picardie, Francia.
